required_skills: Proficiency in at least one systems programming language: Python, Go, or C++
Experience with Linux operating systems and shell scripting (Bash)
Familiarity with Docker and Kubernetes for containerised workloads
Understanding of networking fundamentals: TCP/IP, DNS, load balancing
Experience with at least one cloud platform: AWS, GCP, or Azure
Good written and verbal communication in English
preferred_skills: Experience with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or equivalent)
Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Pulumi)
Knowledge of distributed systems and consensus algorithms
Exposure to financial systems or trading platforms
responsibilities: Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices using Python and Go
Automate infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and Ansible
Monitor system health using Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK stack
Participate in on-call rotation and incident response
Collaborate with software engineers, data engineers, and QA teams

background_fit.candidate_background_summary: The candidate holds a Bachelor of Science in Real-Time Interactive Simulation and has demonstrated skills in C++ and game development concepts like game loops and collision detection.
background_fit.role_requirements_summary: The role requires an Entry to Mid Level Systems Engineer focused on designing microservices, automating infrastructure using tools like Terraform, monitoring systems with Prometheus/Grafana, and working with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP).
background_fit.alignment_commentary: The candidate possesses a relevant systems programming language skill (C++) but lacks demonstrated experience in the core infrastructure, DevOps, networking, and cloud technologies required by the job description. There is no evidence of experience with tools like Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, or observability platforms.

summary:
• The overall score is 37, indicating a low alignment with the required systems engineering role.
• The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in core infrastructure, DevOps tools, and required cloud platforms like AWS or Kubernetes.
• Background fit scored 25, reflecting a significant gap between the candidate's skills and the job requirements.
